patches.summary: Add statistics and campaigns_leads to resourceIDFieldOverrides with their real PKs (stats_id, campaign_lead_map_id).
patches.reason: The generator profiler did not emit ID-field overrides for these dependent resources; their PKs match none of the generic id fallbacks, so every row was dropped at upsert and both tables synced empty.
patches.validated_outcome: statistics and campaigns_leads tables populate during 'workflow archive'; novel-feature commands (health, drift) now have data to query.
patches.upstream_issue: Same class as cli-printing-press#689 (Kalshi resourceIDFieldOverrides); no smartlead-specific issue filed yet.

patches.summary: Inject the parent FK into dependent items before upsert (sync.go) and coalesce to parent_id when the typed FK column is absent (store.go coalesceFKValue).
patches.reason: Dependent typed tables declare a NOT NULL '<parent>_id' column the API response does not carry, so typed inserts failed their constraint and rows fell back to the generic resources table only.
patches.validated_outcome: Dependent rows land in their typed tables instead of only the generic resources table.

patches.summary: Add store.FormatIDValue to render integral float64 IDs as plain integers; applied at the UpsertBatch and sync.go extractID ID-extraction sites.
patches.reason: JSON-number IDs unmarshal to float64 and rendered in scientific notation (e.g. '3.093733e+06'), making campaign IDs unusable as input to other commands.
patches.validated_outcome: Campaign IDs in health/dupes output render as plain integers and feed cleanly into other commands.

patches.summary: Emit 'workflow archive --json' as compact (one-line) JSON instead of indented.
patches.reason: syncResource streams NDJSON sync events to stdout; an indented multi-line final object broke line-delimited JSON parsing of the combined stream.
patches.validated_outcome: 'workflow archive --json' output parses as valid line-delimited JSON.

deferred_to_upstream.summary: Profiler should emit resourceIDFieldOverrides for dependent resources and recognize NOT NULL parent FK columns on typed dependent tables.
deferred_to_upstream.reason: Generator-shaped — same root cause as cli-printing-press#689. The idfield-overrides and dependent-fk patches are local repairs until the profiler descends into dependent path-items.
